no: Ports 12 IWD items into BG2 Joluv's store. Choose EITHER cn:100 (all items at once) OR individual items (cn:1-61). Cannot mix — each individual component FORBID's cn:100 and vice versa. For the ultimate preset, cn:100 is recommended.
sum: Ports Icewind Dale items into BG2, adding IWD's unique weapons, armor, and accessories to shops and treasure throughout the game.

co.no: Installs all 12 IWD items to Joluv's store at once. Mutually exclusive with individual item components — if you select this, do NOT select individual items (cn:1-61). Each individual component has FORBID_COMPONENT against cn:100.
Individual item install. Mutually exclusive with cn:100 (Install All). FORBID_COMPONENT prevents both from being installed.
